Policy Notes: Organic SKUs require valid Soil Association certificate on file before first order.
Edible oils are surcharge-sensitive; commodity pass-through clauses must be capped at 8% per annum.
High-velocity line; benchmark reviewed quarterly. Reject quotes more than 5% above benchmark.
Glass packaging deposit handled separately; confirm deposit terms before approval.
Seasonal demand spikes Q4; secure capacity commitments before peak.
Single-origin claims require lot traceability documentation.
High counterfeit-risk category; PDO origin must be verified.
Allergen statement (wheat) must appear on all delivered packaging.
Plastic packaging EPR fees apply; confirm recyclate content above 30%.
Cocoa sourcing must hold Rainforest Alliance or equivalent certification.
Roast date must be within 30 days of delivery.
Ethical Tea Partnership membership required for new suppliers.
